name: setDrift
title: setDrift
description: A constant deviation can be set for the timers of a network node with this function. Inputs for the two values may lie between –10000 and 10000 (corresponds to –100.00% to 100.00%). If the value does not lie within this range, a message is output in the Write Window.
Setting of a Drift causes any existing Jitter to be reset.
